name_en: POCHETTE FELICIE Three-piece set bag chain M69977 Elephant Grey 80482 Black 81759 Pink Print 82047 Cream Strawberry
name_cn:
POCHETTE FELICIE Three-piece set bag chain M69977 Elephant Grey 80482 Black 81759 Pink Print 82047 Cream Strawberry
Depicts Monogram print on Monogram Empreinte leather. The envelope-style structure can contain a bag shape and internal pocket. Attach the chain to complete the transformation between a handbag and a shoulder bag.
size:21x12x3cm-
